pr.title: Non-record: 10L E2E TTT-Linear + FlowRefiner — val_bpb 1.1347 (README request)

output.summary: 10-layer GPT blends end-to-end TTT-Linear per-head adaptation with a tiny latent-flow FlowRefiner before logits, keeping the ensemble under 16 MB by quantized output compression.
techniques: E2E TTT-Linear inner-loop per-head SGD on learned projections
1-step latent FlowRefiner with Euler-style vector field update
Mixed int6/int8 per-row quantization plus lzma-6 compression
